![CEC UPS Header](https://www.ups.com/assets/resources/webcontent/images/ups-shield.png)








Hello Drew,



I checked the request and found.
For TransportationMode the valid values need to be -

01 - Highway 02 - Ground 03 - Passenger Aircraft 04 - Cargo Aircraft

  ![image.png](https://support.pluginhive.com/attachments/token/QmEixYOPV7vHHCJ8wNxmEMAf6/?name=image.png "image.png")



You will also need to include PackageIdentifier in the request

Lalit B.

If your integration is hardcoded to refresh tokens every 4 hours, you will need to update your logic.
